prompt: O acesso ao X (antigo Twitter) foi bloqueado no Brasil em 2024?

citations.title: Brazil lifts ban on Elon Musk's X after it pays $5m fine - BBC
Brazil’s X ban is coming to an end: all the latest news | The Verge
X banned in Brazil, including access via VPN and mobile apps X banned in Brazil, including access via VPN and mobile apps X banned in Brazil, including access via VPN and mobile apps
X is back in Brazil after a five-week ban

response: The access to X (formerly Twitter) was blocked in Brazil from August 30, 2024, to October 8, 2024. The block was imposed by the Brazilian Supreme Court judge Alexandre de Moraes after X owner Elon Musk refused to appoint a legal representative in the country and comply with court orders to block certain accounts. The block was lifted after X paid fines totaling $5.2 million, appointed a legal representative in Brazil, and complied with orders to deactivate accounts.
response_no_search:
Até a data do meu conhecimento (dezembro de 2023), não há informações sobre o bloqueio do acesso ao X (antigo Twitter) no Brasil em 2024. É importante notar que as informações podem mudar rapidamente, e é sempre recomendável verificar fontes atualizadas para obter as informações mais recentes.
